calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Room 501A
Judge Pro Tem: James P. Green
Clerk: John Stokes
Reporter: Bob Balian

This cause of action was transferred from Room 218. Plaintiff Devendra Patel was present and
was represented by Bruce C. Burge, Esq. Defendants Bruce Herring and Karen Herring were present in pro per. The parties stipulated for an entry of judgment for restitution of the
premises located at 948 Mission St.#43. The Plaintiff waives back rent and damages to Feb.3, 2003 and the writ is stayed to Feb. 3,2003 at 5:00 pm. If defendants vacate as stipulated, the Plaintiff will file a dismissal with predjudice. If not the Plaintiff will enter a judgment for possession and damages.There are to be no stays or appeals if a judgment is entered.
